name: Baked Beef Curry with Custard Topping (Bobotie)
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix ground beef with bread crumbs, 1 cup of milk, 1 egg, chopped onion, almonds, raisins, lemon juice, curry powder (use 2-3 teaspoons), salt, and pepper.
2. Spread the mixture in an ungreased 2-quart casserole dish.
3. Cook uncovered at 325 degrees Fahrenheit for 45 minutes; drain excess fat if necessary.
4. In a separate bowl, mix beaten eggs with 1 cup of milk.
5. Pour the egg mixture over the beef mixture and sprinkle with paprika.
6. Place the casserole in an oblong pan (13 x 9 x 2 inches) on the oven rack.
7. Add very hot water to the bottom of the pan, filling it to a depth of about 1 inch.
8. Cook uncovered until the beef is done and the custard is set, approximately 30 minutes.
9. Garnish with lemon slices and pimiento if desired.
10. Cut into wedges to serve.
